name: FinBox
description: Modular credit decisioning APIs with bank statement parsing, alt credit scoring and underwriting for Indian lenders.

seo.title: FinBox — Fraud & Risk Management
seo.meta_description: FinBox: Modular credit decisioning APIs with bank statement parsing, alt credit scoring and underwriting for Indian lenders.

when_to_use: Bank statement analysis API for Indian lending underwriting
Alternative credit scoring for thin-file loan applicants
GST-based business revenue verification for SMB lenders
Fraud signal extraction from financial transaction history
KYB enrichment for fintech merchant onboarding in India

pros: Strong bank statement parsing for Indian lenders
Alt credit signals for thin-file borrowers
Modular APIs you can adopt one at a time
Built for Indian banking data quirks
cons: Underwriting depth thinner than traditional bureaus
Limited English docs and community content
review.verdict: The right underwriting API stack for Indian lenders, irrelevant if you do not lend in India.
review.best_for: Indian NBFCs, lending fintechs and BNPL players underwriting via bank statements.
review.not_for: Lenders in US, EU or LATAM that need local bureau and alt-data coverage.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
